name: add-deltachat
tagline: Adds a DeltaChat (email-based, E2E-encrypted) channel adapter to a NanoClaw-style messaging bot host, with account setup and wiring steps.
verdict: Solid, concrete integration skill: idempotent pre-flight checks, a pinned npm dependency, deterministic OS branching, worked SQL/CLI examples, and an unusually thorough troubleshooting section. No security red flags found. Weak spots: no version/changelog signal, and no 'NOT for' guidance to prevent misfiring against sibling add-<channel> skills in the same.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or sibling-skill pointers despite being one of a family of similarly named add-<channel> skills (add-slack, add-telegram, etc.) with plausible misfire.
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
